title: Resolve Hardens Under Kaido’s Cruel War
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Momonosuke, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Shinobu as The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
scene: The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this keeps going they'll be wiped out.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know him!! He's one of Luffy's friends!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Iroman frankly!! With a bounty of 94 million berries!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So humans like this really exist...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cut it out you bastard!! I told you, you're never going to catch me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You moron, what are you doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh! That's right! There was an under- ground floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Momonosuke!! Shinobu!! Are you guys okay!? Did you get captured?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No, that's not it!! We're being rescued!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Iron Man Franky!! I'll leave this floor to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy left me in charge of these two!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have no idea who you are, but... Roger that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You have my thanks! As a reward...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let me take this one out at least!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Resolve Under Kaido’s Rule storyline with 39 dialogue beats. The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
